name: Serrano Salsa Verde
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the tomatillos and serranos in a saucepan.
2. Pour water into the saucepan until all ingredients are covered.
3. Bring mixture to a boil and continue boiling for 5 minutes.
4. Drain the mixture.
5. Allow chiles to cool enough to handle, then discard stems and seeds.
6. Transfer cooled chiles and tomatillos to a blender.
7. Add approximately two-thirds of the avocado, along with cilantro, green onion, and garlic.
8. Puree until smooth.
9. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and sugar (if desired).
10. Blend briefly to combine.
11. Spoon salsa into a decorative bowl.
12. Chop remaining avocado and stir it into the salsa.
